commands.command: re-review — real behavior proof ci now passes (completed/success). proof section present with all 6 required fields
commands.freeform_prompt: — Real behavior proof CI now passes (completed/success). Proof section present with all 6 required fields.

target.title: fix(gateway): regenerate native hook descriptors when relay unavailable after restart
target.body:
## Problem
Native hook direct-bridge errors hard-deny when relay is unavailable after gateway restart. Stale native hook descriptors are not regenerated, and Codex app-server relay invocation failures do not fall back to generic OpenClaw before-tool-call policy.

Fixes #89325

## Root Cause
Stale native hook descriptors were treated as hard errors instead of falling through to gateway RPC. Codex app-server relay invocation failures had no fallback to generic OpenClaw policy evaluation.

## Fix
Change stale native hook direct-bridge errors to fall through to gateway RPC instead of hard-denying. Change Codex app-server relay invocation failures to fall back to generic OpenClaw before-tool-call policy evaluation.

## Real Behavior Proof

- **Behavior addressed**: Native hook descriptors became stale after gateway restart, causing hard-deny errors instead of regenerating. Codex app-server relay invocation failures rejected tool calls without policy fallback.
- **Real environment tested**: Linux (Node.js 22), openclaw development checkout with pnpm, vitest 4.1.8.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
  1. `node ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.cli.config.ts src/cli/native-hook-relay-cli.test.ts`
  2. `node ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-codex.config.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/approval-bridge.test.ts`
- **Evidence after fix**:
```
$ node ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.cli.config.ts src/cli/native-hook-relay-cli.test.ts

 RUN  v4.1.8 /home/user/openclaw

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  20 passed (20)
   Duration  7.23s

$ node ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-codex.config.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/approval-bridge.test.ts

 RUN  v4.1.8 /home/user/openclaw

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  64 passed (64)
   Duration  26.19s
```
- **Observed result after fix**: All 84 tests pass (20 CLI native hook relay + 64 Codex approval bridge). Tests cover relay regeneration on unavailable relay, fallback from stale descriptors to gateway RPC, and Codex app-server fallback to generic before-tool-call policy.
- **What was not tested**: Live gateway restart with active native hook relay was not manually tested end-to-end. The tests verify the code paths for relay regeneration and fallback policy evaluation in isolation.
